markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the content OS and select initial calibration articles.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Calibration Articles Selected:** Two articles will be produced to calibrate content quality and voice: "AI video agents for realistic practice" (customer service training) and "AI for healthcare, building HIPAA complaint, patient video conversations" (HIPAA use case).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**New Strategic Input:** Tavus provided new strategic assets—the CBI page's feature-to-use-case formula and content for new product launches (Raven, Phoenix 4)—to be integrated into GrowthX's artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:** GrowthX will conduct a technical SEO audit to identify "quick win" improvements (e.g., page speed, click depth) Tavus can implement immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Branding Assets:** Tavus will provide a Figma file with blog cover templates, a font package, and a color palette to ensure brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

## Topics

### Content OS & Calibration Process

  - [GrowthX presented the Content OS, a \~200-article plan organized by topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**Calibration Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [GrowthX drafts articles in Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [Tavus provides feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
          - [**Line-by-line comments** for specific edits.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
          - [**"Meta feedback"** (e.g., voice, strategy) in bullet points at the top of the doc.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [GrowthX ingests meta feedback into its AI pipeline to prevent recurring issues.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Calibration Article Selection

  - [Tavus selected two articles to calibrate the content pipeline:](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Use Case:** "AI video agents for realistic practice" (customer service training).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Technical/Thought Leadership:** "AI for healthcare, building HIPAA complaint, patient video conversations."](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**Rationale for Healthcare Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [Directly counters a competitor's key weakness (not HIPAA compliant).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [Tavus's HIPAA compliance is a major sales advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [The article will be used to arm the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### New Strategic Input from Tavus

  - [Tavus provided new assets to refine GrowthX's strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**CBI Page Formula:** The Conversational Video Interface (CBI) page demonstrates a formula for generating infinite use cases by combining core features (e.g., bring your own LLM, memory, emotional control).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**New Product Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
          - [**Raven Model:** Emotional intelligence model (launched Tuesday).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
          - [**Phoenix 4:** Expressions model (enterprise customers today, general release next Tuesday).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Significance:** This content is already leadership-approved, making it ideal for calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Branding & Technical SEO

  - [**Branding:** Tavus will provide assets to maintain brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [**Figma File:** Blog cover templates with dithered/pixelated surrealist images.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [**Font Package & Color Palette.**](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Technical SEO:** Tavus requested a list of immediate site improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [GrowthX will perform a technical audit to identify "quick wins" (e.g., page speed, click depth).](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [Draft the two calibration articles for delivery early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Conduct a technical SEO audit and provide a list of "quick win" improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Integrate new strategic input (CBI formula, Raven/Phoenix 4 content) into artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Set up Tavus on the "Check That" AI search analytics platform.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [**Tavus:**](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Review GrowthX artifacts, adding comments to explain rationale.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Share a key artifact with Quinn for strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with the Figma file, font package, and color palette.](https://fathom.video/share/uU-cPA-tkbNBbYvTxgmszsxjE3LCzyHN?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
